steps.t: Faeron and Rhadrog have asked for your help scouting the southern wilds of Agarnaith. You should scout locations on the southern edge of the swamp.
Faeron and Rhadrog should now be returning to the Agarnaith Ranger Camp. You should meet up with Faeron and Rhadrog.
Faeron and Rhadrog should now be returning to the Agarnaith Ranger Camp. You should meet up with Faeron and Rhadrog.
Faeron can be found at the Agarnaith Ranger Camp. You should talk to Faeron and deliver your scouting report.
